creator: wjw@digiware.nl
text:
I was under the impression that it would get deleted.
But that was only for ceph13:

DEPRECATED=     Uses deprecated version of python
EXPIRATION_DATE=        2020-09-15

The ceph release schedule is on:
https://docs.ceph.com/en/latest/releases/general/

And there ceph12 and ceph13 are EOL.
Not all of the python code would work in python3, so it would clear if everything would work out of the box. 

So as far as that deletion would be oke.
